categories.title: World of Luxury Kitchens
categories.tagline: Where culinary art meets exceptional design

products.name: Jura E8 Automatic Espresso Machine
products.description: Fifteen brewing specialities at the touch of a button. The Pulse Extraction Process delivers the finest crema and an incomparable flavour.

products.name: De'Longhi La Specialista Arte
products.description: Built-in grinder, smart tamping station and dual heating system — barista-level results in your own kitchen, every morning.

products.name: Le Creuset Signature Cast Iron Set
products.description: French craftsmanship since 1925. Enamelled cast iron that distributes heat perfectly and lasts a lifetime — a true kitchen heirloom.

products.name: Smeg 50's Retro Style Espresso Machine
products.description: Italian design icon. Polished chrome finish, professional steam wand, and that unmistakeable retro silhouette that transforms any kitchen.

products.name: KitchenAid Artisan Series Stand Mixer
products.description: The original. Ten speeds, planetary mixing action, and over 30 attachments. Built to last generations — available in over 30 colours.

products.name: Teak Garden Dining Set — 8 Seater
products.description: Grade A teak from sustainably managed forests. Weather-resistant, naturally oil-rich, and more beautiful with every passing season.

products.name: Weber Genesis E-335 Gas Grill
products.description: Three powerful burners, sear station, side burner. Weber's finest freestanding grill — engineered for those who take outdoor cooking seriously.

products.name: Napoleon Prestige 500 Built-In Grill
products.description: Infrared side burner, rear burner, WAVE cooking grids. Professional outdoor kitchen performance for the serious entertainer.

products.name: Designer Outdoor Lounge Set
products.description: Powder-coated aluminium frame, Sunbrella fabric cushions. Elegant all-weather lounging for terraces, patios, and pool areas.

products.name: Luxury Fire Pit — Corten Steel
products.description: Weathering Corten steel develops a unique patina over time. A sculptural centrepiece that brings warmth and atmosphere to any outdoor space.

categories.title: World of Fine Fragrances
categories.tagline: The invisible signature of extraordinary character

products.name: Black Orchid Eau de Parfum
products.description: A luxurious and sensual fragrance of rich, dark accords and a floriental heart. Black truffle, orchid, dark chocolate — unforgettable.

products.name: Aventus Eau de Parfum
products.description: Inspired by the life of Napoleon Bonaparte. Pineapple, birch, musk and ambergris. The world's most celebrated masculine fragrance.

products.name: Sauvage Elixir
products.description: A powerful, concentrated elixir. Spicy top notes of ginger and cardamom give way to a woody, sensual base of sandalwood and hawthorn.

products.name: Naxos Eau de Parfum
products.description: Italian niche perfumery at its finest. Lavender, tonka bean, tobacco and honey — the essence of a golden Mediterranean afternoon.

products.name: Interlude Man Eau de Parfum
products.description: A dissonant journey between harmony and chaos. Oregano, amber, frankincense — opulent Arabian perfumery crafted for those who dare.

categories.title: World of Timepieces
categories.tagline: Precision as a way of life

products.name: Conquest Classic Automatic
products.description: Swiss precision since 1832. Self-winding movement, sapphire crystal, 50m water resistance. Timeless elegance on the wrist.

products.name: Seastar 1000 Chronograph
products.description: Swiss Made diver's watch with 300m water resistance. Unidirectional rotating bezel, luminescent hands, and Swiss chronograph movement.

products.name: Meisterstück Soft Grain Briefcase
products.description: Full-grain calfskin leather with the iconic Montblanc emblem. The definitive companion for those who conduct the world's business.

products.name: Freelancer Automatic Skeleton
products.description: Open-worked dial revealing the automatic movement in motion. 42mm case, calfskin strap. Swiss craftsmanship at an exceptional value.

products.name: Classic Fusion Titanium 45mm
products.description: The Art of Fusion. Scratch-resistant titanium case, black ceramic bezel, sapphire crystal — where horology meets contemporary design.

products.name: Beosound A9 5th Generation
products.description: 360-degree sound, iconic circular design. Aluminium and fabric in perfect harmony. The centrepiece of any room that values both design and acoustics.

products.name: 606 S3 Anniversary Bookshelf Speakers
products.description: Seven decades of British acoustic engineering. Continuum cone technology, decoupled tweeter — a reference monitor for the discerning listener.

products.name: Era 300 Spatial Audio Speaker
products.description: Dolby Atmos spatial audio in a single speaker. Six drivers, four amplifiers, and Sonos TruePlay tuning — music the way the artist intended.

products.name: Beoplay H95 Wireless Headphones
products.description: 40 hours battery, adaptive active noise cancellation, lambskin ear cushions. The pinnacle of wireless headphone engineering.

products.name: Phantom I Premium Wireless Speaker
products.description: 108dB, 3000W of pure class A amplification in a single cabinet. French engineering that redefined what wireless audio could be.

products.name: Abstract Gold Leaf Canvas — Large Format
products.description: Hand-applied genuine gold leaf on stretched canvas. Each piece unique. A statement artwork that anchors any living space with quiet authority.

products.name: Villeroy & Boch Artesano Vase Collection
products.description: Fine European porcelain with hand-painted detailing. A timeless decorative object that elevates any shelf, table, or console.

products.name: Cashmere Throw — Herringbone Weave
products.description: Pure Grade A Mongolian cashmere, herringbone weave. Extraordinarily soft, naturally temperature-regulating — the definition of understated luxury.

products.name: Arc Floor Lamp — Brushed Brass
products.description: Brushed brass finish, articulated arm, linen shade. A sculptural lighting object that defines atmosphere in any living or reading space.

products.name: Swarovski Crystal Object Collection
products.description: Precision-cut crystal objects that capture and play with light. Iconic Swarovski craftsmanship — collectible decorative pieces of enduring beauty.
